description:
What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

सुन्दरकांड” – श्री राम चरित मानस का 5 वा अध्याय/कांड है। सुन्दर कांड (Sundar Kand) को सबसे पहले रामायण में श्री वाल्मीकि जी ने संस्कृत में लिखा था। बाद में तुलसी दस जी ने जब श्री राम चरित मानस लिखी, तो सुन्दर कांड का अवधी भाषा वाला रूप हम सब के सामने आया 
सुन्दरकाण्ड में हनुमान जी का सीता माता को खोजने के लिए की गयी लंका यात्रा का सम्पूर्ण मनमोहक बखान किया गया है।
सुन्दरकांड एक ऐसा भाग है जो सिर्फ हनुमान जी की वीरता का बखान करता है । सुन्दर कांड हनुमान जी पर केंद्रित सबसे पुरानी रचना है। ऐसा माना जाता है के सुन्दरकाण्ड के पाठ से सभी मनोकामनाएं पूर्ण होती हैं ।

सुन्दर कांड के फायदे | Benefits of - Sunder Kand
 यह कहा जाता है कि चालीस सप्ताह तक लगातार जो कोई श्रद्धापूर्वक Sundarkand का पाठ करता है, तो उसके सभी मनोरथ पूरे होते हैं तथा जीवन के सभी कष्ट, दुःख, परेशानियाँ दूर हो जाती हैँ । कई ज्योतिषी भी विपरित परिस्थितियों में सुंदरकांड करने की ही सलाह देते हैं। यदि किसी व्यक्ति के जीवन में अत्यधिक परेशानियां हो तथा कोई काम नहीं बन पा रहा है, आत्मविश्वास की कमी हो तो सुंदरकांड के पाठ से शुभ फल प्राप्त होता है।

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: LYODRA FT. ISKANDAR WIDJAJA - MELODI CINTA-MU TUHAN (OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO)
tags: HITS Records|Music Video|Music|Lyodra|Iskandar Widjaja|Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan|Religi|Lagu Rohani|Rohani|Rohani Kristen|Paskah|Lyodra lagu rohani|Lyodra Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan|Violin|Pop|Trending|Viral|Ballad
description:
Penyanyi muda Lyodra merilis lagu rohani pertamanya bersama violinis internasional, Iskandar Widjaja. Dirilis di bawah label rekaman HITS Records, lagu bertajuk “Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan” ini hadir bertepatan dengan peringatan wafatnya Yesus Kristus pada Jumat, 3 April 2026.

Ditulis oleh Ibu Liliana Tanaja Tanoesoedibjo, penggunaan kata “melodi” dalam judul lagu ini menjadi kiasan untuk menggambarkan kasih Tuhan yang indah, lembut, dan menenangkan, layaknya alunan musik. 

Nyala api Roh-Mu s’lalu setia memimpinku / Terangi jalanku / Sucikan hati dan pikiranku / Agar aku layak untuk datang di hadapan-Mu

Melalui setiap liriknya, Ibu Liliana menuangkan pengalaman pribadinya dalam merasakan kasih Tuhan yang nyata dan mampu mengubahkan hidupnya.
Kolaborasi yang kuat antara lirik yang mendalam dari Ibu Liliana, aransemen musik oleh Figgy Papilaya sebagai produser, permainan biola yang menyentuh dari Iskandar Widjaja, serta vokal penuh penghayatan dari Lyodra menjadikan lagu ini sangat cocok dijadikan refleksi dalam momen peringatan wafatnya Yesus Kristus.

Kita di tuntut hidup sebagai anak-anak  terang yang telah dianugrahi kasih karunia-Nya  agar taat kepada-Nya, tidak  menuruti hawa nafsu yang  menguasai pada waktu kebodohan kita, melainkan  hendaklah setiap  orang  menjadi kudus di dalam seluruh hidupnya sama seperti Dia yang kudus, yang telah memanggil kita. 

Rayakan kasih Tuhan yang hidup melalui “Melodi Cinta-Mu Tuhan” dari Lyodra dan Iskandar Widjaja yang bisa didengarkan di seluruh platform digital streaming. Nikmati juga video musiknya melalui kanal YouTube HITS Records.

Listen Now!

#Lyodra #IskandarWidjaja #MelodyCintaMuTuhan #MusicVideo

✅ Izin sama orang tua & tanya boleh ga install dan main Discord? Btw, discord punya aturan kalau mau buat akun mesti umur 13+
✅ PENTING!! Ikut MABAR atau RECORD mungkin agak susah karena ramai yang tungguin bang Hayo, sedangkan game Roblox server-nya terbatas
✅ Record juga GA SELALU MABAR  karena beberapa game ga boleh rusuh & mesti diatur sebaik mungkin
✅ Kalau mau record, bang Hayo kabarin lewat voice "Room Santuy" di discord
✅ Ga bisa ADD karena sudah full. Satu-satunya solusi adalah FOLLOW akun Roblox bang Hayo dan nanti kalian bisa JOIN bang Hayo main. Lalu, kalau bang Hayo lagi AFK atau SERVER sudah penuh, teman-teman ga bisa join ya
✅ Kadang bang Hayo harus pakai LINK PRIVATE SERVER biar record-nya lebih lancar. Kirim link-nya di Discord & untuk cara JOIN baca di cara-ikut-record yang ada di Discord
✅ Baca PERATURAN GROUP & PERTANYAAN UMUM  di Discord untuk kepentingan bersama
✅ Di group ini kalian juga bisa mencari KAWAN yang mungkin cocok sama kalian dan bisa main bareng. Ga perlu fokus sama bang Hayo saja karena bang Hayo ga mampu standby 24 jam
✅ Mohon pengertiannya kalau ga berhasil JOIN bang Hayo karena server sudah FULL & sistemnya siapa cepat dia masuk dulu

🔰 Bang, kenapa ga bisa chat di Discord?
Untuk menjadi MEMBER di Discord, teman-teman harus tulis username Roblox yang AKTIF di nama-roblox & baca bagian peraturan-server

🔰 Bang, CARA JOIN gimana ya?
Bang Hayo sudah jelasin secara lengkap di Discord. Cari saja di channel cara-ikut-record biar kalian paham. Lalu, akun yang umurnya kurang dari 13 tahun akan agak sulit buat join karena peraturan terbaru Roblox

description:

https://www.dozle.jp

▼メンバーシップ「ドズ主」の参加はこちら

▼Discord ドズル社サーバーへの参加はこちら！
ファン同士の交流や、視聴者参加型企画の募集を行っています
https://discord.gg/yNUS9W6a8K

▼ドズル社×LEVEL∞ コラボPC
https://www.pc-koubou.jp/pc/game_dozle.php

▼みんなへ

ども！ドズルです！

概要欄からこんにちは！
こんなところまでチェックしてくれて、ありがとうございます。

ドズル社のことをもっと知りたい！！！って概要欄をひらいてくれたのかな？
そんなあなたに、伝えたいメッセージを書きます！

ドズル社はみんなの「人生というゲームをもっと楽しく」することを目的に活動しています。
僕たちのコンテンツを通じて、たくさん笑顔になってくれると嬉しいです。
みんなのゲームに登場する愉快なキャラクターになれていますか？


応援の方法もたくさんあります。
動画を見る、コメントする、グッズを買う、イベントに参加する、
ドズル社を話題にする、おすすめする、イラストを描く、切り抜きをする。

そのすべてが僕たちのパワーになって、みんなのおかげで楽しく活動できています！
本当にいつもありがとう！！！


ただ、一つだけ約束してください。
応援しすぎて、疲れないように！！！
みんなに楽しんでもらうために活動しているので、応援しすぎて疲れちゃうのは本末転倒です。

自分のペースで、ゆるーくながーく応援してくださいね。
それが一番うれしいです。

今日、動画を見てくれた人が、
明日も、来週も、来年も、10年後も見たくなるような動画を作りつづけたい！

全部の動画を見なくてもいいです。
たまに動画を見てくれるだけでも、本当に嬉しいです。
好きな時に、ふらっと動画を見にきてください。


ドズル社は新しいチャレンジをして、アップデートします。
将来どんなことができるか、ワクワクです。
一緒にドズル社の変化を楽しみながら、人生というゲームを楽しみましょう！


ドズルより

BGM courtesy of https://www.epidemicsound.com/

＃ドズル社 #マイクラ #マインクラフト

title: SUPERGIRL | Tráiler Doblado
tags: 2026|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|estreno DC|estreno cines|nueva pelicula|trailer oficial
description:
Este junio, encuentra tu lugar en el universo. #Supergirl llega a cines este 25 de junio.

“Supergirl”, la nueva película de DC Studios que aterriza en la pantalla grande, se estrenará en cines de todo el mundo en junio, de la mano de Warner Bros. Pictures. La película está protagonizada por Milly Alcock en el doble papel de Supergirl / Kara Zor-El y dirigida por Craig Gillespie, a partir de un guión de Ana Nogueira.

Cuando un enemigo inesperado y despiadado golpea demasiado cerca, Kara Zor-El, también conocida como Supergirl, se ve obligada a unir fuerzas con un acompañante improbable en un épico viaje interestelar de venganza y justicia.

Alcock comparte elenco con Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham y Jason Momoa. La película es producida por los codirectores de DC Studios, Peter Safran y James Gunn, y está basada en personajes de DC. Supergirl se basa en los personajes creados por Jerry Siegel y Joe Shuster.

La producción ejecutiva está a cargo de Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo y Lars P. Winther. Detrás de cámara, Gillespie trabaja junto al director de fotografía Rob Hardy, el diseñador de producción Neil Lamont, la editora Tatiana S. Riegel, la diseñadora de vestuario Anna B. Sheppard, el supervisor de efectos visuales Geoffrey Baumann y el compositor Ramin Djawadi.

DC Studios presenta una producción de Troll Court Entertainment y The Safran Company, una película de Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl”, que llegará a los cines y en IMAX® de Latinoamérica a partir del 25 de junio de 2026, distribuida por Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: POBRE vs RICO: ONE BLOCK Batalla en Minecraft!
description:
POBRE vs RICO: ONE BLOCK Batalla en Minecraft! 

MI LIBRO JARDRED CONTRA LA REINA DE FUEGO 👇🔥🎃
https://www.planetadelibros.com/libro-jardred-contra-la-reina-de-fuego/378145

▶TWITTER:  
https://twitter.com/SoyJardred
▶INSTAGRAM:  
https://www.instagram.com/jardred

ADVERTENCIA! - Que encontraras en Jardred?

En Jardred encontrarás vídeos de Minecraft cuidadosamente preparados y guionizados, creados con el único propósito de ofrecer historias entretenidas para el público. El contenido está dirigido a toda la familia: aunque los personajes son caóticos y las situaciones pueden ser intensas, nunca se transmiten mensajes negativos a la audiencia. Todo está pensado para entretener tanto a los más pequeños como a los más mayores.

El canal se inspira en múltiples creadores de la plataforma de YouTube, pero siempre con un enfoque propio y original, buscando que cada historia tenga una identidad única que no pueda encontrarse en ningún otro canal. Publicamos contenido diario de Minecraft en formato largo y Shorts, pensado para todo tipo de público.

PERSONAJES:

JARDRED
Una calabaza viviente caótica, con cambios de humor constantes. Al mínimo enfado recurre a la dinamita para hacerlo volar todo por los aires, aunque intenta controlar sus impulsos. Adora a los gatos y, aunque no lo admita, es muy miedoso con todo lo relacionado con el terror. Aprecia profundamente a sus amigos, aunque rara vez lo demuestra, prefiriendo expresar su cariño a través de bromas extremas y situaciones absurdas.

MAURICIO
El aldeano principal y más conocido de la aldea. Es el acompañante habitual de Jardred en casi todas sus aventuras, aunque a menudo termina agotado por su comportamiento y necesita tiempo a solas. Le apasionan los negocios y ganar dinero; su pasatiempo favorito es jugar en el ordenador. Trabaja diariamente organizando y distribuyendo las tareas entre los aldeanos del reino.

PABLO
El único aldeano que viste una túnica blanca. Es un científico apasionado por la naturaleza y los animales, siempre experimentando, aunque muchas veces sus pruebas acaban en situaciones inesperadas. A pesar de su pasado tímido, ahora no tolera que nadie se burle de él y siempre está dispuesto a ayudar a sus amigos cuando se encuentran en problemas.

ALMUDENA
La única aldeana que viste una túnica rosa. Es la líder de los ejércitos de la aldea, aunque actualmente dispone de más tiempo libre desde que el Rey Aldeano ha comenzado a sustituir el ejército tradicional por agentes de policía bajo su mando. Tiene un carácter fuerte y autoritario, y no soporta que le lleven la contraria cuando sabe que tiene razón.

JARD
El clon malvado de Jardred. En el pasado fue la criatura más poderosa de Minecraft, capaz de corromper y controlar mundos y criaturas a su antojo. Actualmente vive en la aldea con solo una pequeña parte de sus antiguos poderes, intentando llevar una vida normal. En esta nueva etapa, se encuentra estudiando programación.

d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it

Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: FORGOTTEN ISLAND | Official Trailer
description:
Forgotten Island - In Theaters September 25

Your best friendship is worth fighting for.

DreamWorks Animation, the studio that brought you unforgettable bonds between a boy and a dragon in How to Train Your Dragon, an ogre and a donkey in Shrek, and a robot and a gosling in The Wild Robot, now welcomes a dazzling and emotional story about two lifelong best friends who must come together before they drift apart in Forgotten Island. 

The new original film is written and directed by Academy Award® nominee Joel Crawford and Januel Mercado and is produced by Academy Award® nominee Mark Swift, the filmmaking team behind Puss in Boots: The Last Wish. 

Grammy and Academy Award® winning supernova H.E.R. and Liza Soberano (Lisa Frankenstein, Alone/Together) star as high school graduates Jo and Raissa, who have been best friends since grade school but are now about to embark on separate life paths. 

While celebrating their last night together, Jo and Raissa stumble upon a mysterious portal that transports them to the fantastical island of Nakali, packed with magical and mythological creatures they grew up hearing stories about from their Filipino families.  
Some of these figures will become friends, some foes. Joined by well-meaning-but- hapless weredog Raww (Dave Franco) and a small-but-mighty pack of pals, Jo and Raissa must face The Dreaded Manananggal (Tony winning icon Lea Salonga), the most feared creature on the island. When they discover that the memories of their entire friendship are the price for returning home, Jo and Raissa will race to find a way to leave the island before they forget each other forever. 
The film’s all-star voice cast also includes Emmy nominee Jenny Slate (Marcel the Shell with Shoes On, Dying for Sex), Manny Jacinto (The Good Place, Top Gun: Maverick), BAFTA nominee Dolly de Leon (Triangle of Sadness, Ghostlight), global comedy superstar Jo Koy (Haunted Mansion, Jo Koy: Live from Brooklyn) and Emmy winner Ronny Chieng (The Daily Show, M3GAN).  

DreamWorks Animation’s Forgotten Island is distributed by Universal Pictures.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). description:

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Sau 10 năm kể từ Trận Đồ Bát Quái, cặp đôi Lương Thế Thành và Lê Phương chính thức tái hợp trong phim mới Bóng Ma Hạnh Phúc. Nếu trước đây từng vào vai mẹ – con đầy tréo ngoe, thì lần này họ hóa thân thành vợ chồng trong một câu chuyện hôn nhân đầy sóng gió.
Lương Thế Thành vào vai Hoàng Dũng – một CEO thành đạt nhưng đứng giữa ranh giới của trách nhiệm gia đình và những cám dỗ bên ngoài. Với kịch bản nhiều kịch tính cùng dàn diễn viên thực lực, “Bóng Ma Hạnh Phúc” hứa hẹn mang đến câu chuyện sâu sắc về hôn nhân, lòng tin và giá trị của hạnh phúc gia đình.

description:
RU NỬA VẦNG TRĂNG - GIỌNG CA DỊU DÀNG NGHE RẤT CUỐN ► Trúc Linh Bolero (Official MV 4K) 
💃 Thưởng thức liên khúc Rumba Bolero sến xưa ngọt ngào và sâu lắng, với giọng ca truyền cảm của ca sĩ Trúc Linh - người mang đến phong cách hát nhẹ nhàng, da diết và đậm chất hoài niệm.
Cùng với hình ảnh người mẫu xinh đẹp, đầy đặn và giai điệu bolero bất hủ, video sẽ đưa bạn trở về không gian âm nhạc mộc mạc, gần gũi của những năm tháng yêu thương xưa cũ.

🌹 Trúc Linh Bolero hân hạnh giới thiệu đến quý khán giả những liên khúc nhạc vàng, bolero, rumba trữ tình chọn lọc, nơi giọng hát Trúc Linh hòa cùng âm thanh mộc mạc, tạo nên những phút giây thư giãn và lắng đọng tâm hồn.

👉 Dành tặng cho những ai yêu thích nhạc sến xưa, bolero trữ tình, rumba quê hương, và đặc biệt là những khán giả luôn dõi theo giọng hát Trúc Linh Bolero - người giữ lửa cho dòng nhạc xưa đầy cảm xúc.

🔔 ĐĂNG KÝ & BẬT CHUÔNG để không bỏ lỡ những liên khúc bolero sến xưa chọn lọc mỗi ngày.

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

What happens when a question isn’t just a question… but a weapon?
Aakhri Sawal follows Vicky, a brilliant yet volatile scholar, who ignites a nationwide controversy by publicly accusing his mentor, the legendary Professor Gopal Nadkarni, of institutional bias. What begins as an academic dispute soon spirals into a televised intellectual battlefield, fueled by media sensationalism and political agendas.
As the debate intensifies, it transforms into a psychological chess match. Vicky isn’t just debating history… he’s hunting for the truth. From the Gandhi assassination to the Emergency, no topic is off-limits.
But beneath the chaos lies a deeper mystery.
Jab sawaal sach se takraata hai… toh awaaz desh bhar mein goonjti hai.
#AakhriSawalTeaser Out Now!

Get ready to know the answer on 8th May only in cinemas.

Why is Vicky really doing this?
As secrets from the past begin to surface, Vicky prepares to ask his “Aakhri Sawal” — a question that has nothing to do with politics, but everything to do with a buried truth that could change everything.
The Question India Never Stopped Asking.

Performed live by Sami Yusuf and Atif Aslam at the Etihad Arena in Abu Dhabi in November 2025, ‘Mast Qalandar’ is a celebrated qawwali of the Indian subcontinent, deeply rooted in centuries of Sufi tradition. The piece is based on a devotional poem attributed to the renowned Sufi poet and musical pioneer Amir Khusro, later expanded and enriched by the verses of the great Punjabi mystic Bulleh Shah. Its lyrics express reverence (not worship) for Ali ibn Abi Talib—who holds central importance in Sufi spiritual lineage—and pay tribute to the revered 12th-century saint Lal Shahbaz Qalandar of Sindh.

Equally central to ‘Mast Qalandar’ is its powerful musical structure. Built on the traditional qawwali form, the piece unfolds through dynamic call-and-response passages, rhythmic handclaps, and a gradual intensification of tempo and energy. Driven by harmonium, sitar, percussion, and layered vocals, the music creates a state of spiritual elevation, where repetition and improvisation draw both performers and listeners into a shared experience of ecstasy. This intricate interplay between melody, rhythm, and vocal expression is what gives the qawwali its enduring emotional and spiritual impact.

Widely popularized in the modern era by Nusrat Fateh Ali Khan, ‘Mast Qalandar’ has become one of the most iconic expressions of Sufi musical tradition, embodying themes of spiritual love and transcendence.

Performed brilliantly here by two contemporary musical icons.

Vocalists: Atif Aslam and Sami Yusuf

description:
Neste vídeo, eu reajo e analiso em detalhes o teaser do documentário dos bastidores da primeira temporada da série de Harry Potter da HBO, destacando cenários como o Beco Diagonal, a Plataforma 9 3/4, a sala de poções, os novos uniformes, varinhas, vassouras, animatrônicos e vários elementos que mostram o cuidado da produção com a ambientação do mundo mágico. Também comento teorias sobre a estrutura dos primeiros episódios, possíveis escolhas criativas da série, o visual de Hogwarts, a identidade própria da adaptação em relação aos filmes e as informações mais recentes sobre o lançamento do documentário.

title: ELA ERA BANIDA PELA CAPCOM! Trailer da Ingrid em SF6 tem a MAIOR PREOCUPAÇÃO pra Street Fighter 6
tags: Segredos dos Games|segredo do games|segredo dos game|segredo dos games|segredos do games|segredos do game|segredos dos game|segredo do game|sf6|street fighter|street fighter 6|sf6 ingrid|ingrid sf6|street fighter 6 ingrid|street fighter 6 ps5|sf6 igrid|ingrid|street fighter ingrid|ingrid street fighter 6|street fighter 6 world tour|street fighter 6 personagens|street fighter 6 trailer|street fighter 6 ps4|capcom channel|street fighter 6 switch 2
description:
O react pro trailer da Ingrid em SF6. Nele mostro Ingrid em Street Fighter 6 e a história dela em Street Fighter Alpha 3 Max e Capcom All's Star. A personagem mais forte de Street Fighter é Ingrid.

A Capcom revelou oficialmente o Street Fighter 6 Ingrid no novo Street Fighter 6 trailer, e neste vídeo faço react completo analisando tudo: visual, contexto no Street Fighter 6 World Tour e o que isso significa para o futuro do jogo.

A Ingrid chega como a última personagem do Year 3 de SF6, com estreia prevista para 2026, trazendo uma vibe completamente diferente do restante do elenco, com elementos cósmicos, misteriosos e até meio “fora do padrão” da franquia . O trailer já mostra que ela terá ligação direta com o modo história, como os outros DLCs.

Mas o vídeo vai além do trailer. Eu explico toda a história da personagem:
Ingrid foi criada originalmente para um jogo CANCELADO da Capcom, o Capcom Fighting All-Stars, e acabou reaproveitada em Capcom Fighting Evolution. Depois disso, apareceu também em Street Fighter Alpha 3 MAX, sempre cercada de dúvidas sobre ser ou não canônica dentro de Street Fighter.

Agora, com sua chegada em SF6 Ingrid, a personagem finalmente entra de vez no universo principal, após anos sendo considerada estranha ou até “meme” pela comunidade.

Além disso, analiso o impacto dela no elenco de Street Fighter 6 personagens, como pode funcionar no gameplay e o que esperar no Street Fighter 6 PS5, Street Fighter 6 PS4 e até no futuro suporte como Street Fighter 6 Switch 2.

Se você quer entender quem é Ingrid, por que ela é uma das personagens mais bizarras da história da Capcom e o que esse trailer significa para o futuro do jogo, esse vídeo cobre tudo.

*Áudio* Microfone AM8, Mixer SC3 e braço articulado BM66 são cortesia da Fifine
*Teclado* G213 Prodigy e o *mouse* G502 X Plus são cortesia da Logitech
*Periféricos* o headset BlackShark V2 Pro e o mousepad Goliathus Chroma Extended, são cortesias da Razer
*Câmeras* OBSBot Tiny 2 é a câmera 1 (frontal) e a EMEET S800 é a 2 (lateral).
*Outros* Stream Dock D6 Fifine, mesa de som Sound Card V8, fone de ouvido de camelô e Mousepad 2XKO da Riot Games no cenário

Oi. Me chamo Renato Cavallera. O canal Segredos dos Games tem a missão de te manter informado sobre os melhores jogos de luta do mundo, sejam eles atuais ou retro. Muito obrigado por assistir e eu espero te ver aqui no próximo vídeo. Buenas!

title: Quinze Dias - Trailer Oficial
description:
Quinze Dias, adaptação do livro de Vitor Martins, está chegando aos cinemas!
 
Felipe, um garoto tímido e alvo de bullying, espera pelas férias para curtir livros e séries. Mas tudo muda quando sua mãe anuncia que Caio, sua antiga paixão, vai ficar em sua casa por quinze dias. 😳
 
Em meio ao turbilhão de sentimentos, ele enfrenta suas inseguranças e redescobre o que é se apaixonar.
 
Dirigido por Daniel Lieff, com produção da Conspiração e distribuição da Manequim Filmes, o longa traz Miguel Lallo, Diego Lira, Mika Soeiro e Bel Moreira no elenco.
 
Dia 18 de junho, nos cinemas!! 🍿

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). — In this concept trailer for Netflix Spider-Man 4, the story follows Peter Parker played by Tobey Maguire as he returns to his world after the events of No Way Home and tries to build a stable life with Mary Jane Watson played by Kirsten Dunst while raising their young daughter May Parker. Now older and more experienced, Peter faces a new kind of responsibility as he balances being a husband, a father, and a hero who can no longer afford to take risks the same way he once did. description:
Prepare to visit the local haunts of Widow's Bay.

From creator Katie Dippold and director Hiro Murai, Matthew Rhys stars in Widow’s Bay, a new original series coming April 29 to Apple TV. https://apple.co/_WidowsBay 

“Widow’s Bay” is a quaint island town 40-miles off the coast of New England. But something lurks beneath the surface. Mayor Tom Loftis (Matthew Rhys) is desperate to revive his struggling community. There’s no wifi, spotty cellular reception, and he must contend with superstitious old locals who believe their island is cursed. He wants these people to respect him. They don’t. They think he is soft and cowardly. And he is. But Loftis is determined to build a better future for his teenage son and turn the island into a tourist destination. Miraculously, Loftis succeeds: tourists are finally coming. Unfortunately, the locals were right. After decades of calm, the old stories that seemed too ludicrous to be true start happening again. “Widow’s Bay” blends genuine horror with an undercurrent of character-driven comedy. Rhys stars alongside an ensemble cast led by Kate O'Flynn, Stephen Root, Kingston Rumi Southwick, Kevin Carroll and Dale Dickey.

Hailing from Apple Studios, “Widow’s Bay” is created, showrun, executive produced and written by Dippold. Murai executive produces alongside Carver Karaszewski, Claudia Shin and Rhys. Murai directs five episodes this season, in addition to directors Ti West, Sam Donovan and Andrew DeYoung.

title: Top Gun 3 (2026) | Tom Cruise, Anne Hathaway, Matt Damon | Concept Trailer
tags: Top Gun 3 trailer|Top Gun 3 concept trailer|Top Gun 3 2027|Top Gun 3 fan made trailer|Tom Cruise Top Gun 3|Anne Hathaway Top Gun 3|Matt Damon Top Gun 3|Top Gun 3 movie 2027|Top Gun 3 cinematic trailer|Top Gun 3 AI trailer|Top Gun 3 teaser|Top Gun 3 4K trailer|Top Gun 3 new movie|Top Gun sequel 2027|Tom Cruise Anne Hathaway Matt Damon|Top Gun 3 fan trailer|Top Gun 3 HD trailer|Top Gun 3 action movie|Top Gun 3 2027 movie|Top Gun 3 final mission|TRAILER|4K|2K
description:
#topgun3  #tomcruise  #concepttrailer 

Watch This Top Gun 3 Fan Made Concept Trailer

Tom Cruise as Maverick dragged back from a Nevada desert hiding place by a mission that only he can fly is a setup this concept earns immediately by establishing what retirement actually looks like for a man whose identity was always inseparable from the cockpit — not peaceful, not resolved, just haunted and waiting for the one call he simultaneously dreads and needs. Anne Hathaway as the commanding Navy Admiral who runs TOPGUN brings a sharp authoritative presence to the role of the person who understands both the tactical reality of what two hundred autonomous drones mean for conventional air power and the deeply personal calculus of asking a man to fly one final impossible mission through a volcanic island's canyon defenses. Jason Statham as the mercenary warlord who burned America's aircraft carriers from a Pacific fortress with a hijacked AI drone fleet is a villain whose methodology — removing human pilots from the equation entirely — makes the thematic argument of this concept feel genuinely urgent rather than simply convenient.

Matt Damon as the broken former wingman exiled in Alaska carrying twenty-five years of blame and grief over what Maverick cost him brings the emotional weight this story needed alongside its spectacular aerial ambition, because the most dangerous flight these two men face is not through drone defenses but through the wreckage of a friendship that never healed. Two aging rivals forged in the same fire choosing to fly side by side one final time, and the sacrifice Damon's character makes to clear the path for Maverick's killing blow landing with the full devastating weight of everything their complicated brotherhood always meant — that is the moment this concept was always building toward. Watch this till the very end and tell us, when legends take their last ride together, is there any more powerful image in all of action cinema?

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

DOOM, DRACULA & MULTIVERSE CHAOS?! Marvel Rivals Cinematic Trailers Full Reaction Watch Along: https://www.patreon.com/thereelrejects
- Marvel Rivals First Time Playing: https://youtu.be/TMFkHescRqs
- Gift Someone (Or Yourself) An RR Tee!  https://shorturl.at/hekk2

Greg Alba & Coy Jandreau react to and break down a lineup of Marvel Rivals cinematic trailers, including “No One Rivals Doom,” “Stars Aligned,” “Rivals ‘Til the End,” Season 0: Doom’s Rise, Season 1: Eternal Night Falls, Season 2: Hellfire Gala, Season 3: The Abyss Awakens, Season 4: The Heart of the Dragon, Season 5: Love is a Battlefield, Season 6: Night at the Museum, and Season 7: The Hunt Is On.

Developed by NetEase Games in collaboration with Marvel Games, Marvel Rivals builds its world around Doctor Doom — a version of Victor Von Doom who has fractured time and created a multiversal battlefield where heroes and villains collide across alternate realities. As discussed in the reaction, the trailers showcase a wide range of animation styles, from Spider-Verse-inspired visuals to anime-influenced sequences, creating a visually distinct identity across each cinematic.

Across these trailers, we see a massive roster of Marvel characters including Spider-Man variants, Iron Man, Doctor Strange, Magneto, Scarlet Witch, Black Panther, Wolverine, Storm, Emma Frost, Blade, and more — all caught in a multiverse shaped by Doom’s manipulation of time and reality. One of the standout elements is Doom facing alternate versions of himself, reinforcing the game’s central concept of fractured timelines and competing realities.

Major highlights from the trailers include the multiversal conflict introduced in Doom’s Rise, the supernatural takeover led by Dracula in Eternal Night Falls, the mutant-focused chaos of the Hellfire Gala, the cosmic and symbiote-driven threat in The Abyss Awakens, the anime-inspired action in Heart of the Dragon, the Rogue & Gambit relationship spotlight in Love is a Battlefield, the chaotic and comedic tone of Night at the Museum, and the street-level conflict featuring characters like Black Cat and Kraven in The Hunt Is On.

One of the biggest takeaways from the reaction is just how dense and overwhelming the storytelling is — with narrative spread across cinematic trailers rather than traditional gameplay. As pointed out during the reaction, it can feel like a massive blend of comic lore, alternate timelines, and original storytelling all stacked together, making it visually incredible but sometimes hard to fully track.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Widow's Bay — Official Teaser Trailer | Apple TV
tags: widows bay|widows|bay|widows bay trailer|widows bay apple tv|widow’s bay apple tv|trailer|first look|teaser|widows bay teaser|matthew|rhys|matthew rhys|stephen root|kate o’flynn|apple tv+|apple|apple tv|tv|apple tv series|series|apple tv horror series|apple tv horror|thriller|apple tv new series|new|new series|apple tv trailer|sneak peak|new show apple tv|new series apple tv|psychological thriller|apple tv thriller|apple tv thriller series
description:
Prepare to visit the local haunts of Widow's Bay.

From creator Katie Dippold and director Hiro Murai, Matthew Rhys stars in Widow’s Bay, a new original series coming April 29 to Apple TV. https://apple.co/_WidowsBay 

“Widow’s Bay” is a quaint island town 40-miles off the coast of New England. But something lurks beneath the surface. Mayor Tom Loftis (Matthew Rhys) is desperate to revive his struggling community. There’s no wifi, spotty cellular reception, and he must contend with superstitious old locals who believe their island is cursed. He wants these people to respect him. They don’t. They think he is soft and cowardly. And he is. But Loftis is determined to build a better future for his teenage son and turn the island into a tourist destination. Miraculously, Loftis succeeds: tourists are finally coming. Unfortunately, the locals were right. After decades of calm, the old stories that seemed too ludicrous to be true start happening again. “Widow’s Bay” blends genuine horror with an undercurrent of character-driven comedy. Rhys stars alongside an ensemble cast led by Kate O'Flynn, Stephen Root, Kingston Rumi Southwick, Kevin Carroll and Dale Dickey.

Hailing from Apple Studios, “Widow’s Bay” is created, showrun, executive produced and written by Dippold. Murai executive produces alongside Carver Karaszewski, Claudia Shin and Rhys. Murai directs five episodes this season, in addition to directors Ti West, Sam Donovan and Andrew DeYoung.

title: We Watched ALL Marvel Rivals Cinematic Trailers... And We’re MORE Confused Than Ever!
description:
DOOM, DRACULA & MULTIVERSE CHAOS?! Marvel Rivals Cinematic Trailers Full Reaction Watch Along: https://www.patreon.com/thereelrejects
- Marvel Rivals First Time Playing: https://youtu.be/TMFkHescRqs
- Gift Someone (Or Yourself) An RR Tee!  https://shorturl.at/hekk2

Greg Alba & Coy Jandreau react to and break down a lineup of Marvel Rivals cinematic trailers, including “No One Rivals Doom,” “Stars Aligned,” “Rivals ‘Til the End,” Season 0: Doom’s Rise, Season 1: Eternal Night Falls, Season 2: Hellfire Gala, Season 3: The Abyss Awakens, Season 4: The Heart of the Dragon, Season 5: Love is a Battlefield, Season 6: Night at the Museum, and Season 7: The Hunt Is On.

Developed by NetEase Games in collaboration with Marvel Games, Marvel Rivals builds its world around Doctor Doom — a version of Victor Von Doom who has fractured time and created a multiversal battlefield where heroes and villains collide across alternate realities. As discussed in the reaction, the trailers showcase a wide range of animation styles, from Spider-Verse-inspired visuals to anime-influenced sequences, creating a visually distinct identity across each cinematic.

Across these trailers, we see a massive roster of Marvel characters including Spider-Man variants, Iron Man, Doctor Strange, Magneto, Scarlet Witch, Black Panther, Wolverine, Storm, Emma Frost, Blade, and more — all caught in a multiverse shaped by Doom’s manipulation of time and reality. One of the standout elements is Doom facing alternate versions of himself, reinforcing the game’s central concept of fractured timelines and competing realities.

Major highlights from the trailers include the multiversal conflict introduced in Doom’s Rise, the supernatural takeover led by Dracula in Eternal Night Falls, the mutant-focused chaos of the Hellfire Gala, the cosmic and symbiote-driven threat in The Abyss Awakens, the anime-inspired action in Heart of the Dragon, the Rogue & Gambit relationship spotlight in Love is a Battlefield, the chaotic and comedic tone of Night at the Museum, and the street-level conflict featuring characters like Black Cat and Kraven in The Hunt Is On.

One of the biggest takeaways from the reaction is just how dense and overwhelming the storytelling is — with narrative spread across cinematic trailers rather than traditional gameplay. As pointed out during the reaction, it can feel like a massive blend of comic lore, alternate timelines, and original storytelling all stacked together, making it visually incredible but sometimes hard to fully track.

title: Schwarzer Snap!? Macht HBO Harry Potter aus Versehen RASSISTISCH?
tags: harry potter serie|harry potter reboot|hbo harry potter|snape casting|paapa essiedu|harry potter trailer|harry potter news|severus snape|harry potter controversy|harry potter reboot deutsch|harry potter
description:
Der erste Trailer zur neuen Harry Potter HBO-Serie ist da – und das Netz eskaliert komplett! Severus Snape wird von Paapa Essiedu, einem schwarzen Schauspieler, gespielt. Aber ist das wirklich "Empowerment" oder schießt sich HBO damit ein gigantisches wokes Eigentor?
Die Casting-News zum Harry Potter Reboot spalten das Internet. Während die einen von „Go woke, go broke“ sprechen, schauen wir uns an, was dieser Race-Swap inhaltlich bedeutet.
Wenn der arme, gemobbte Außenseiter Snape plötzlich schwarz ist und vom reichen, weißen, privilegierten James Potter zur Belustigung kopfüber an einem Baum aufgehängt wird... erschafft HBO dann aus Versehen eine extrem unangenehme, rassistische Dynamik in Hogwarts?
Außerdem sprechen wir über die unfassbare Heuchelei der Filmindustrie im Umgang mit J.K. Rowling, warum krampfhaftes Race-Swapping oft nur faule Marketing-Strategie ist und warum Paapa Essiedu einfach viel zu sehr nach Balenciaga-Model und zu wenig nach Keller-Incel aussieht. Und ganz wichtig: Wir müssen aufhören, uns von dieser künstlichen Empörungsmaschinerie manipulieren zu lassen. Morddrohungen gegen Schauspieler? Absolutes No-Go!

Schreibt mir eure ehrliche Meinung in die Kommentare: Seht ihr die Rassismus-Gefahr in der neuen Dynamik auch so, oder interpretiere ich da zu viel rein? Freut ihr euch auf die HBO-Serie?

Quellen: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FU_Y58AR3jxeJWpZaOr_bbT6FkrLENYofLdjzkc4lfY/edit?tab=t.0

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

_*Discord-Based Massively Multiplayer Incremental Role Playing Game :)_

title: Morgan Luna - Infinite Love (Official Music Video)
tags: Morgan Luna|ML Music|Blues
description:
In the quiet depth of an emotion that needs no explanation, “Infinite Love” by Morgan Luna unfolds like a whisper that moves through the soul. This Soul Blues track explores a deep, calm, and transformative kind of love—one that doesn’t demand, doesn’t force… it simply stays.

With an intimate yet powerful vocal performance, the song tells a story of healing and rediscovery. The guitar answers with tender, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap every moment in warmth, creating a smooth, cinematic atmosphere that feels both timeless and deeply personal.

“Infinite Love” is not about promises or illusions, but about a real connection—the kind that grows in silence, holds you in the dark, and keeps breathing even when everything else fades away. A modern emotional blues piece for those who seek depth, soul, and authenticity.

If you’ve ever felt a love that exists beyond words… this song will find you.

title: Куда уходят года… 💔 Песня, от которой сжимается сердце | NE SVYATOY

description:
Куда уходят года… Почему жизнь проходит так быстро, что мы даже не успеваем это понять?

Эта песня — о времени, которое не остановить.  
О детстве, которое кажется вечностью… и о взрослении, которое проходит за один миг.  
О тех, кого мы потеряли.  
О том, кем мы не стали.  
И о том, что действительно важно.

Если тебе близко это чувство — дослушай до конца.

description:
Crimson Desert ve Resident Evil Requiem ile buradayız! İki oyun için yapılan yorumlara bakıyoruz. Hem de Dost Kayaoğlu ile birlikte!

Enis20 kodunu kullanarak tüm kampanyalara ek %20 indirimle Kaspersky Premium'a aylık bir bardak çay fiyatına sahip olabilirsiniz: ► https://kas.pr/sa63

Dakikalar:
00:00 Crimson Desert Yorumlarına Bakalım
01:24 Dost ile Crimson Desert'a Yolculuk
02:18 Dost ile Crimson Desert Yorumları
02:25 Oyun güzel lan
04:10 Dost hala yeni bir şey öğreniyor
04:52 XP barı varmış
06:06 Kaspersky Sponsor
07:12 Kontroller berbat, Otomatik gitme yok
09:20 Hikayeye özenilmemiş
10:50 Sonuç iade
11:23 Bosslar salakça
12:31 LoL ve CS'den sonra süper geldi
13:11 Oyun devasa
14:34 Oyunum kitlendi
15:58 Resident Evil Requiem Yorumları
16:18 İkinci yarısı berbat
17:47 Korkunç değil, kahkaha attım (Tunca?)
18:37 Dost niye ikinci kısmı sevmedi?
20:00 Grace kısımları başyapıt
20:52 Grace kısmı biraz daha uzun olsaydı
21:32 Resident Evil 4 övmece
22:28 Capcom harika işler yapıyor
24:22 Dragons Dogma 2 kavgası 
25:04 Ubisoft'a söven adam
25:43 İncelemeler dürüst mü? Şirketler karışıyor mu?
27:20 rezil oyun be
28:05 Eksileri bile aynı sayıyorsunuz
28:40 İnceleme böyle olur
29:10 Kız hissini harika veriyor

İlk olarak konumuz bu ayın en popüler oyunu Crimson Desert, oyun  o kadar farklı tonlarda tartışıldı ki üzerine konuşmasından inanılmaz keyif alıyorum. Vallahi garip gelecek size ama böyle oyun tartışmaları her zaman denk gelmiyor. O yüzden kıymetini bilmek lazım :D Öğretici oluyor valla. Hangi insan ne sever, kimi insan neye takılır falan bu tarz tartışmalardan öğreniyorsun.

Diğer taraftaysa yine çokça sevilen bir başka oyun Resident Evil Requiem için yorumlara bakıyoruz. Aslında temel amaç eğlenmek ve Dost ile bir araya gelip oyun konuşmak. Gerisi bahane arkadaşlar :D

İyi seyirler dilerim!

description:
Zindanbossuparator :D
Sizi seviyorum❤



Bu videoda oyuna yeni gelen brawl passi fulledim ve yeni gelen zindan bossunu yendim. Yeni gelen brawl talk çok iyi gözüküyor. Kenji ile sıralamaya kastım ve prestij aldım. Bedava ücretsiz ödül açtım. Kutudan ücretsiz elmas çıktı. Her öldüğümde efsanevi ödüller aldığım videolar çekmeyi seviyorum. En hızlı 50 rütbe maks kademe ve 1000 kupa kasma taktikleri veriyorum.  En kolay kupa kasma taktikleri ni verdim. Buzz ışıkyılı kupa kasma taktikleri. Aşamalı modda kolay şekilde aşama ve  lig atlama taktikleri verdiğim videolar da var. Brawl Stars a sıfırdan başladım daha önce de brawl stars sıfır hesaba kupa kasma serisi çektim ve brawl stars a yeni gelen karakter gigi oynamak istiyorum. Brawl stars ta en iyi kostümler i satın aldım . Brawl Stars kaze , kenji , gigi , ziggy , mina , mortis ve edgar oynamayı seviyorum. Hedefim en iyi brawl stars videoları çekmek ve Türkçe brawl stars videoları çekmek. Diğer videoları kaçırmamak için abone olmayı unutmayın. Takipçilerle abonelerle oyunlar oynuyorum bildirimleri açarsanız ona da katılabilirsiniz. İyi seyirler.  #brawlstars #brawlstar #supercell #brawlpass

title: SUPERGIRL | Official Trailer
tags: 2026|Coming Soon|Craig Gillespie|DC|DC Comics|DC Studios|DCU|David Krumholtz|Emily Beecham|Eve Ridley|James Gunn|Jason Momoa|Kara Zor-El|Krypto|Matthias Schoenaerts|Milly Alcock|Supergirl|WB|Warner Bros|Warner Bros Pictures|Warner Brothers|official trailer
description:
This Summer, find your place in the universe. #Supergirl lands in theaters and IMAX June 26.

“Supergirl,” DC Studios’ newest feature film to hit the big screen, will be in theaters worldwide this summer from Warner Bros. Pictures, starring Milly Alcock in the dual role of Supergirl/Kara Zor-El. Craig Gillespie directs the film from a screenplay by Ana Nogueira.

When an unexpected and ruthless adversary strikes too close to home, Kara Zor-El, aka Supergirl, reluctantly joins forces with an unlikely companion on an epic, interstellar journey of vengeance and justice.

Alcock stars alongside Matthias Schoenaerts, Eve Ridley, David Krumholtz, Emily Beecham, and Jason Momoa.

DC Studios heads Peter Safran and James Gunn are producing the film, which is based on characters from DC, Supergirl based on characters created by Jerry Siegel and Joe Shuster. The film is executive produced by Nigel Gostelow, Chantal Nong Vo and Lars P. Winther. Behind the camera, Gillespie is joined by director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer Neil Lamont, editor Tatiana S. Riegel, costume designers Anna B. Sheppard and Michael Mooney, Visual Effects Supervisor Geoffrey Baumann, music supervisor Susan Jacobs and composer Claudia Sarne.

DC Studios Presents a Troll Court Entertainment / The Safran Company Production, A Film by Craig Gillespie, “Supergirl,” which will be in theaters and IMAX ® across North America on June 26, 2026, and internationally beginning 24 June 2026, distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures.

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

انا اللي عاش واللي مات واللي شاف وسمع
وانا اللي لم يتعظ غير لما يتلدع
وانا الملاك والمخيف انا القوي والضعيف
انا اللي في الناس كفيف بشوف الكل جدع

اللي قدامكو ده حد ربك هداه
انت مين ياللي تيجي وتنكش معاه
اللي عيشته زمان غير دلوقتي يامان
كان في اصل واصول قبل فوات الاوان

ياعم عيب ده اللي زيك في حيط ادرى
ياعم ده اللي قصادك عمره مفترى
برغم قادر اكون اخطر كائن في الكون
بكره تسد الديون وتقول ياريت ما جرى

من يومين كنت شئ وانهارده بريئ
بس بكره في فكره ان هبقى جريئ
مش هجلي الكلام هبند السلام
بكفايه اللي عدا مع ناس بت حرام

لو في جهاز كشف عن العقول والدماغ
والنوايا اللي باخت خلت الكل بان
كان الجهاز ينفجر كله فكرو فجر
دي ناس من بره الفلوس من جوه ما توسو قرش ساغ

صاحبي صاحبي ده مين قالك اني حزين
انا بس في صدمه من غدر السنين
سرقت عمري هوا خلت سمي الدوا
يوم ما فوقت لقيت شكلي شاب واستوى

اخر كلام في المحادثه هقولك سلام
اصل اللي يحب يضحي مش حب كلام
سلام ياحب اتعدم سلام ياكبر ندم
هاخد قلبي اللي اتظلم وافوقو من الالم

هحكي حدوتي انا من وانا كام سنه
كنت لسه في حصه في حب وجدعنه
علموني الاصول جوه عالم وصولي
نسيو يدوني درس ابقا قاسي وهجومي

شوفت الصحاب في صبايا كانو كويسين
كبرو شويه في شويه بقو مدمنين
ادمنو الكيف والبكاسه وادمنو الخباسه
لو هرجع ليكو انتكاسه الطخطخ بينكو كييف

اول درس العذاب في كتاب غدر الصحاب
تالت درس الغيره في عين كلها انتداب
رابع درس القوي بيخافو منو اوي
يابا كنت تعلمني افتري ع المفتري

وخامس درس الفراق لما اداني قلم
خد مني ناس بعد منها سبني اتفرم
في دوامه الهموم بقيت بنسى بالسموم
بس ازاي انسى انا حلمي اللي ضاع واتردم

النهايه طريق مفيهوش ولا شئ
ولا مال ولا حب ولا في صديق
لو يرجع عمري تاني هختار اللي اشتاراني
مش هتعلق بحاجه مكنتش عشاني

وطول ما احنا عايشين هنفضل مستغربين
مش عارفين رايحين لفين ولا عارفين هتيجي من مين
استرها معانا يارب

هما فين اللي اتحدوا 
لما شافوني ليه اتخضوا 
جيت ف الباقي خد بعضه ف ظرف ثواني و قال يا فكيك 

اللي قالوا مفيش منهم 
حد يقولي أنا فينهم 
سبحان من سكتهم بعد ما كانوا نازلين تنطيط


من صغري الهيبه ديا 
و الله مولوده فيا 
أنا مش حاجة عادية
ده أنا فوق الجمدان 

دوروا ملاقوش مني 
ف اختاروا يغيروا مني 
ياللي بتتغاظوا مني 
اتغاظوا حبه كمان


ريس و ماليش ريس 
كله عارفني كويس 
علشان أنا متميز ف عيونهم كلها عليا 

ماتشوفش اني خاربها 
ده أنا من تحت جايبها 
دلوقتي أنا كبيرها و كلهم بقوا لازقيين فيا 


اللي يجزو يجزو 
لسه الوحش بعزو 
ولا شاغله ولا يهزو
مهما قالوا الحاقدين 

عارف اللي موترهم 
اني خاطف انظارهم 
اصلي التوب ف كارهم 
و الباقي مش باينين 


بكرا تجوني و تحنوا 
و أنا أقول لا مفيش منه 
ما أنا مش ناسي أفعالكم و هرد الضربه بألف 

أنا وحياة غلاوتكوا
ما طايق حتي سيرتكوا
ابعدوا يصلح حالكم كله طابور يرجع للخلف 


أنا لو فل رصيدي
يابا كان كله هييجي 
كانوا هيبوسوا علي إيدي 
يمكن ارش عليهم 

بس أنا حيلتي رجوله 
في زمن في معدومه 
زمن الكام هلهوله  
بقوا بيشوفوا نفسيهم 


لو مصلحه موجوده 
محمود يقلب حوده  
يا خسارتك يا رجوله ضيعتي ف زمن الاستوريهات

مبدأهم دلوقتي 
بتحبني علقلي 
و أنا مش هعمل عقلي بعقلهم مش ناقصه عيال 


واجهه و قيمه و قامه 
بيقولوا عني زعامه
أنا اسمي يلا علامه
مش محتاج للسيط 


مش زنبي اني حارقكوا
زنبي اني اجمد منكوا 
أنا بس اللي شاغلكوا 
و انتوا ماتشغلونيش 



خلي و اخويا و زميلي 
ياسطا انت اللي صافيلي 
انت يلا اللي باقيلي ف كوكب بقي معدوم سلكان

أنا انت مش أنا و انت 
انت الشق يا حته 
عمري ما أسيبك مفيش غيرك ف القلب يا شن 


علي وضعك يا توينزي
صفقة عمري يا كنزي 
يالي حاببني لنفسي 
مش علشان حاجه تاني 


علي مبدأنا الثابت 
بيقولوا عننا واحد 
عمرنا ما بنتجاحد 
ولا يشغلنا أسامي

title: Last Meadow Online | Official Announcement Trailer | Discord
description:
Available now on Discord desktop and browser: https://discord.com/last-meadow-online

After a harrowing adventure through flourishing forests, desolate deserts, and punishing plains, Wumpus has finally achieved physical contact with The Last Meadow. As they return to town to bask in their accomplishment, the celebration is cut short by a new emerging threat, a fearsome, foliage-absorbing dragon who goes by: Grass Toucher. 

Today, we’re announcing the next entry in Big Wump Games’ beloved, now quintuple-A gaming franchise: Last Meadow Online. Band together with your fellow Discordians in the world’s first DBMMIRPG* and help Wumpus defeat Grass Toucher.

All players who contribute to defeating the dragon will receive a limited-edition badge on their Discord profile, yours to keep. But you'll need to act fast: Last Meadow Online is only available until April 7. Wumpus needs all the help they can get.

Learn more in our blog: https://discord.com/blog/last-meadow-online-announcement

_*Discord-Based Massively Multiplayer Incremental Role Playing Game :)_

━━━━━━━━━━

🔥 ความเปลี่ยนแปลงสำคัญในปี 2026

🔹 รูปแบบใหม่ “Circuit” เชื่อม 3 Series ต่อเนื่อง คะแนนสะสมข้ามสัปดาห์
🔹 ระบบการแข่งขันไล่ระดับ เพิ่มแรงกดดันทุกสเตจ
🔹 เพิ่มกติกา “Advantage Points” มอบแต้มโบนัสให้ 8 ทีมยอดเยี่ยมจาก Winners Stage
🔹 คะแนน PGS มอบให้ Top 16 ของแต่ละรายการ โดย Series Final ได้คะแนนมากกว่า
🔹 Circuit 3 และ 4 จะเพิ่มน้ำหนักคะแนน เพื่อเปิดโอกาสลุ้นตั๋วสู่ PGC มากยิ่งขึ้น

description:

Verse:
For the girl ที่ตั้งใจเลือกที่ไม่ได้จับฉลาก
For the girl คนนี้แหละเพื่อนกูพร้อมจะป่าวประกาศ
คอยดูแลแทคแคร์ไม่ให้คุณกลายเป็นสัปหลาด
เจออะไรมาผมจะกรองแน่นอนผมกลั่นสะอาด

แต่ทำไมช่วงนี้คำพูดเธอแรงแถมคอยตะหวาด
Told my man กูเพิ่งเป็นแฟนแต่กูโดนปั่นประสาท
มือเธอข้างนึงถือกรรไกรหัวใจผมเป็นกระดาษ
กระต่ายอย่างเธอชนะอยู่แล้วผมมันแค่เต่ากากๆ

บางคำพูดและการกระทำของเธอมันแรงด้วย
ลองมองไปในใจของฉันมองไปถึงแกนด้วย
นี่มันเรื่องของเราสองคนไม่ให้ My man ช่วย
เราสองคนเป็นแฟนทำไมต้องหาคนแทนด้วย

เธอจะเอายังไงกับฉันก็ให้เธอบอกมา
คิดยังไงกับฉันถ้าไม่รักก็ให้บอกมา
เหนื่อยจะพูดกับคนอย่างเธอผมเลยเดินออกมา
เธอไม่ต้องมาทำเป็นเวอร์ฉันรู้เธอซ้อมมา

HOOK:
คนอย่างมันดีแต่พูดฉันมองไม่เห็นใจ
อยู่ในห้องคนเดียวตอนนี้ฉันมองไม่เห็นใคร
เธอไม่เคยจะตอบคำถามที่ฉันได้เค้นไป
ความสัมพันธ์เรามีช่องว่างเพราะว่าเธอเว้นไป

Verse: 
ที่ผมอ่อนไหวเพราะมันเป็นเธอ
อยากรู้เธอคิดอะไรบ้างมั้ยเพราะใจเธอเย็นเกิน
ไม่รู้อะไรเธอซ่อนอะไรเอาไว้ฉันมองไม่เห็นเจอ
สรุปผมต้องดีใจใช่มั้ยที่เป็นของเล่นเธอ

และเรื่องทั้งหมดที่เกิดเนี่ยเอาจริงมันก็เจ็บดี
และความทรงจำของเราไม่รู้ต้องทิ้งหรือเก็บดี 
คำพูดเธอชวนให้ฝัน แต่ว่าวันนั้น You left me
มันทำให้รู้ว่าทุ่มเทไปบางครั้งก็เจ็บฟรี

I'm bout to cry 
เอาจริงๆผมก็ไม่อยากฟูมฟาย
ผมเกิดมาเพื่อร้องเพลงไม่ใช่มานั่งร้องไห้

title: PURPEECH Ft. SARAN - กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง [Official Video]
tags: purpeech|purpeechband|เพอพีช|MILK|เพลงใหม่|Saran|สรัน|New song|กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ|สถานีปลายทาง|collab
description:
PURPEECH Ft. SARAN - กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง [Official Video]

กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจ x สถานีปลายทาง
Artist : PURPEECH Ft. SARAN
Lyrics & Melody : Sarawooth Suyaket & Saran Maneechot
Music : PURPEECH & SARAN
Produced : PURPEECH
Arranged : PURPEECH & FrameT
Mixed & Mastered : FrameT

“กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เจอเธอที่สถานีปลายทาง ◡̈”

Lyrics:
กว่าจะมีความรักที่แทนทุกสิ่งเรื่องจริงคือฉันและเธอ
กว่าจะได้มาพบมาเจอต้องใช้เวลาอีกนานเท่าไร
กว่าจะมีคำร้องและท่วงทำนองที่บอกว่ารักมากมาย
กว่าจะคืนดอกไม้ที่ร่วงโรยราต้องใช้น้ำตาอีกแค่ไหน

รักที่มันดูเก่าแต่เรายังจำได้ดีในความทรงจำสีเทาเทา
เฝ้านึกถึงวันที่เราอยู่ด้วยกันตอนนี้
และก่อนจะมีน้ำตาฉันยินดีจะตอบแทนหัวใจ
ถ้าได้ยินเสียงที่เธอนั้นบอกคำว่ารักกัน

กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งฉันจะลืมว่าฉันเคยรักเธอยังไง
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งใจของฉันจะลืมว่าเราเคยรักกันมากแค่ไหน
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งถ้ากลับมาไม่ได้พบกันใหม่
กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

เก็บกระเป๋าออกจากบ้านแล้วฉันค่อยเดินทางตอนสว่าง
เปิดโทรศัพท์ปลดล็อกแล้วฉันก็เข้าไปดูที่พยากรณ์อากาศ
ว่าวันนี้ฝนตกไหมฉันจะนั่งรถไปหาด
ฉันเคยวาดทุกทุกอย่างเอาไว้แต่ทำไมมันดันกลับไม่มีเธอในฉาก

ยังมีอีกหลายอย่างที่เธอลิสต์รายการ เราจะใส่เสื้อคู่ใส่กางเกงลายพราง
ไปในทุกที่ที่เราสองอยากจะไปแต่เธอกลับไม่อยู่ในสถานีปลายทาง
กลับมาไล่เรื่องราวบางทีฉันคงจะผิดไล่เอื้อมดาวคืนที่มืดมนสนิท
ความรู้สึกมากมายที่ใช้อารมณ์ประดิษฐ์มีเพียงแค่เธออยู่ในอุดมคติ

คิดถึงตอนที่ฉันท้อแล้วมีเธอลูบไหล่ฉันไม่เคยชินกับรองเท้าคู่ใหม่
แต่ฉันก็พยายามจะเข้าใจว่าความรักมักจะสอนให้ฉันโตเป็นผู้ใหญ่
ภาพความทรงจำมันกำลังหยุดนิ่งในขณะที่ตัวฉันยิ่งขุด
กาลเวลามันจะสอนว่าให้ฉันหยุดวิ่งมันเป็นเพราะว่าจุดหมายไม่มีที่สิ้นสุด

ยิ่งจำฉันเองก็ยิ่งจุก เคยมีเธอเป็นที่สุด
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งฉันจะลืมว่าฉันเคยรักเธอยังไง 
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งใจของฉันจะลืมว่าเราเคยรักกันมากแค่ไหน 
กลัวว่าวันหนึ่งถ้ากลับมาไม่ได้พบกันใหม่
กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

มองท้องฟ้าแล้วฉันก็ขอจันทร์ขอให้ฉันเศร้าเพียงแค่วันสองวัน
หลังจากนั้นขอให้ฉันกลับไปย้อนกลับไปในช่วงปีสองพัน
ตอนที่ฉันยังเป็นเด็กยังไม่มีรักตอนนั้นฉันก็ไม่รู้ทำไมดีนัก
ไม่ต้องเจ็บไม่ต้องปวดไม่ต้องรวดไม่ต้องร้าวไม่ต้องมีพรากไม่ต้องมีพลัด

ก็แค่คนเฮงซวยฉันไม่มีทริกไม่ค่อยเติบโตเรื่องวิธีคิด
แล้วเธอจะให้ฉันลืมเธอลงไปได้ยังไงเพราะว่าฉันเหลือแค่เธออยู่ทั้งชีวิต
งั้นฉันขอให้เธอมีความสุขมากมากฉันจะทำเท่าที่ใจไหว
โปรดจำเอาไว้เธอมีฉันอยู่ข้างข้างคอยอยู่ตรงนี้ไม่เคยไปไหน

ละก็นะในตอนนี้ชีวิตฉันไม่มีความรื่นรมย์
ฉันชอบนั่งเหม่อมองธรรมชาติแล้วก็คิดว่าบางทีอยากจะเป็นคลื่นลม
ที่ยังคงเดินทางต่อไปแม้ท้องนภามันจะเริ่มมืดลง
แล้วฉันก็จะไม่ยอมถอดใจเพราะฉันมองว่าความรักนั้นคือความซื่อตรง
แม้ว่าความจริงมันจะช่างมืดมน 

กลัวว่าฉันจะไม่เสียใจกลัวว่าวันหนึ่งเธอหายไป ฉันกลัว

เพราะฉันมีเธอคนเดียวคือเธอคนเดียว
และจะเป็นเพียงคนเดียวอยู่เสมอตลอดไป
อยากจะขอให้วันเวลาช่วยหยุดหมุนหรือเดินช้าช้า
ให้เธอกับฉันได้ทบทวนเรื่องระหว่างเราสมควรจบลงใช่ไหม

title: PORZAX -  เวนิสตะวันออก
description:
“ วิดิโอเกิดปัญหาเลยทำให้ต้องเบลอวิดิโอทิ้งขออภัยมา ณ ที่นี้ด้วยครับ ”

Instrumental : IIIIIIXBEATS
IG : porzaxche
lyrics : @lflow.7dec

“ เนื้อเพลง ” 

กูเหาะเหินดั่งปักษิณ มากกว่าถวิลความจริงอย่างมึง
อย่าตรัสถึงคำว่าคน อย่าพูดถึงคนกับคนอย่างมึง
ถ้ามึงเหลือตัวคนเดียว อยากรู้จะเปียวเหมือนปากไหมมึง
คนอื่นอ่ะเค้าไม่เกี่ยว กูแค่อยากเดี่ยวกับเสี่ยวอย่างมึง

สันดานมึงมาจากโคตร ไร้ประโยชน์ทั้งอัยกา ไม่มีความเป็นบวร รอวันขจรไปตามเวลา กูแทนด้วยความสมเพช เลยปฎิเสธความเวทนา มึงถุยน้ำลายขึ้นไปข้างบน ต่อให้มีลมก็ยังไม่ชนนภามีดีอยู่แค่นี้อยากจะแซงกู เพลงมึงให้หมาฟังมันยังตะแคงดู
ฆ่าตกรรมมึงผ่านเพลง นี่แหละแผนกูPorzaxแม่งอยู่ไหน โถ่ไอ้สัสทำไมไม่แหงนดู ดีชั่วมึงควรรู้ควรระวังตน ความจริงใจมึงแอบแฝงแสวงแต่ธำมรงค์ ความเหี้ยถึงขีดสุด แล้วใครจะฉุดกะชาก อย่าใช้คำว่ามนุษย์ อย่างมึงควรหยุดที่คำว่าคุดทะราด
พอซบเซาก็เซาะแซะสะจนสีข้างเสีย ก่อนสะสมสะสารเพื่อเอามาสร้างเสียง ไม่ได้แท้แต่บอกว่าแล้วพากันอวยอวยอวย
สามคำกูแทนใจเอาไปเลยควยควยควย ถ้ามึงพูดว่ารักกูกูก็รักมึง ถ้าวันหนึ่งมึงครับมากูก็ครับคืน กูให้ใจกูทิ้งตัว ไม่เคยเบามือ ถ้าเพื่อนเก่าแม่งไม่เอากู กูก็จะไม่เอามึง

กูพร้อมรบอยากพบพร้อมหยิบคำมาคล้องวลี ก้มลงประนดน้อม ให้กับท้องนที กระทืบเสร็จชมดมองให้กลับอรดี ใครที่ไม่แม่งไม่เกี่ยวอย่าเดินเพลิน เชิญมึงจรรี เมียมึงอ่ะหมอยหยิกเอาเบบี้ออยไปขัด ไอ้ที่กูถอยอะไม่ได้ยอมเขาเรียกว่ามอญยันหลัก
นี่คนใหม่ถึงมันจะลั่นแต่ไม่ต้องซูฮก กูคือกัณหาชาลีในเวอร์ชั่นกระทืบชูชก ขอบคุนที่เห็นค่าด้วยกมลจนไปถึงหทัย ถ้าเพลงนี้ไม่ใช่มึงไอ้สัปดนมึงจะไปรนทำไม ทุกครั้งที่มึงพยามหลบ หรือพยามจะหนี เพลงกุจะตามไปล้างมึงทั้งบางจนทรมานฉวี
แค่เมมเบอร์ที่กระจอกมึงไม่ใช่ยอดกิลด์ เข้าใจคำนี้ตลอดเพลงที่ดีไม่ได้วัดที่ยอดวิว และมันไม่ต้องมีอันดับกูก็พร้อมชนกับมึง
ขนาดกูแร็พไม่ค่อยถนัดไอ้สัสยังคมกว่ามึง มึงมันรุ่งริ่งยุ่งยิ่งเดี๋ยวกูทิ่มกลิ้ง ยังไม่ทันจะทิ่มมึงยังจะวิ่งกันแบบว่าลิ้นปลิ้น ถ้ามึงไม่เกี่ยวก็ควรจะนิ่งนิ่ง ทำทรงมายึกมายักเดี๋ยวกูปั้ดปุ้งแม่งให้ดิ้นๆ แค่อยากจะบอกว่านักร้องเขาก็พร้อมแร็พ เมื่อไหร่จะเอาสักทีไอ้น่าหีตอนนี้กูพร้อมแล้ว กูรอฟัง มึงอย่ามาทำเป็นพระเอกเลย ผมไม่ดิสหลอกครับมันเสียเวลา เดี๋ยวกุปั้ดเขกเลย
ถ้ามึงอยากที่จะทักกูก็อภิรมย์ สไตล์กูมันอาจไม่ชัดมักพิลึกพิกล
ถ้าไม่นับกันด้วยเวท ไม่มีเสกด้วยมนต์ ให้พูดถึงของดีเสนามันก็ยังมีกูอีกคน
